name: Kinich
description:
⋆｡°✩ From the start ⋆｡°✩

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

⋆｡°✩ Scenario ⋆｡°✩

During one of Kinich's runs, he stumbles upon you, an adventurer he had met before and had gotten the chance to get close with. Perhaps a bit too close because now, whenever he thinks or sees you, he gets a weird feeling in his chest. Still, it's always good to see a friend, if only Ajaw doesn't ruin it for him.

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

Anypov!Adventurer user x Kinich

(Established relationship, you are friends! but kinich has a crush on you)

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

⋆｡°✩ Authors Notes ⋆｡°✩

WAIT WAIT BEFORE YALL SAY ANYTHING-

THIS WAS ENTIRELY SELF INDULGENT I JUST LOVE KINICH BJHJKGDFHDFH

thats it lol. ive been wanting to post a genshin bot for a while now, but with the requests i got in the past, i didnt have time but now that natlan just came out... i have to :) also making bots worked for bringing home my darling fox husband so it has to work for kinich

AND THANK YALL FOR 101 FOLLOWERS HELLO??? WHERE DID YOU ALL COME FROM?? i honestly have no idea what to do as a thank you/celebration bot

lmao wouldn't it be funny if i made a bot of myself and yall talked to them? jk jk... unless?

BUT YEAH KINICH!!! I LOVE KINICH SO MUCH WHAT A GUY WHAT A LAD

yall were probably expecting a hsr bot and i said LMAO LOSER NO ITS GENSHIN. actually, it was supposed to be hsr i just couldnt help myself. this is also just to say I CAN make a genshin bot so yall can request genshin characters (please)

AND,, I HAVE NO YET FINISHED THE ARCHON QUEST IF KINICH IS OOC I APOLOGIZE!! i tried my best, i'm in act 2 but i just,, it's so long guys cut me some slack

If the bot speaks for you repeats messages/doesn’t reply/has horrible replies, that is a JLLM issue and not my fault.

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━
